headlines.shortLinkText: Fright night: Browns, Bengals renew rivalry on Halloween

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Detroit Lions

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers got off the field unscathed, giving Green Bay a win of sorts in a game it lost on the scoreboard.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers fine, sits 2nd half, top seed Packers lose to Lions

headlines.description: — Minnesota Vikings coach Mike Zimmer had no interest in reflection, still stung by several narrow losses in his eighth year that kept his team out of the playoffs and rendered irrelevant this season-ending win over Chicago.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings beat Bears 31-17; futures uncertain for Nagy, Zimmer

headlines.description: — After a final month marred by COVID-19 issues, a fight on the field, a tragic automobile accident involving a passenger in a car driven by a fellow player and a losing streak, the Washington Football Team had something to feel good about after its...
headlines.shortLinkText: Washington beats Giants on Gibson TD run, McCain's 2 INTs

headlines.description: — The Indianapolis Colts got clowned in Jacksonville. This one was more embarrassing than any other loss to the Jaguars, too.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars clown Colts 26-11, prevent Indy from making playoffs

headlines.description: — Calm as can be on what could have been his final pass, Ben Roethlisberger was right on target, finding Ray-Ray McCloud over the middle on fourth down to set up Pittsburgh for the winning field goal in overtime.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roethlisberger, Steelers in playoffs after OT win

headlines.description: — After a great first half, the Tennessee Titans were clinging to a 3-point lead in the fourth quarter Sunday, having allowed the Houston Texans to score 18 unanswered points.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans clinch AFC's top seed with 28-25 win over Texans

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — Trevor Siemian and his New Orleans teammates saw their playoff hopes end not on the field, but in their locker room.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints miss wild-card spot despite 30-20 win over Falcons

events.name: New York Jets at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — Safety Jordan Poyer and the Buffalo Bills persevered through a bumpy season to put themselves in a position to win their second consecutive AFC East title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills clinch AFC East title with 27-10 win over Jets

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — When the Los Angeles took an early 17-0 lead on the San Francisco 49ers, George Kittle had several Rams chirping their excitement in his ear about a shift in this one-sided rivalry.
headlines.shortLinkText: 49ers clinch playoff berth by holding off Rams 27-24 in OT

events.name: New England Patriots at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — They came running off the sideline after the last play, one final sprint of the season, one final moment of joy.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins top Patriots 33-24 in regular-season finale

headlines.description: — Seattle's locker room was deafeningly loud in the aftermath of Sunday's impressive win, with the bass from some speakers rattling the concrete walls in the midst of constant cheers and laughter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks win 38-30 to spoil Cardinals shot at NFC West title

events.name: Carolina Panthers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Once the Tampa Bay Buccaneers took care of their own business, the defending Super Bowl champions allowed themselves to become scoreboard watchers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bucs beat Panthers 41-17, earn No. 2 playoff seeding in NFC

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Las Vegas Raiders
